Hitchcock (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,008,677Details
International Box Office $18,734,167
Worldwide Box Office $24,742,844
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,442,650
Total $1,442,650
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A love story about one of the most influential filmmakers of the last century, Alfred Hitchcock and his wife and partner Alma Reville. The film takes place during the making of Hitchcock's seminal movie Psycho.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$287,715 (4.8% of total gross)
Legs:5.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:17 opening theaters/561 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,999,290

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2012 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: January 10th, 2013 (Wide) (Australia)
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Israel)
February 1st, 2013 (Wide) (Mexico)
February 1st, 2013 (Wide) (Estonia)
February 1st, 2013 (Wide) (Finland)
Video Release: March 12th, 2013 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violent images, sexual content and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2243, 10/3/2012)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall, Prologue
Plot point: Biography, Death of a Sibling, Hallucinations, Non-Chronological, Performing Arts
Social setting: Movie Business
Subgenre: Biographical Drama

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Fox Searchlight Pictures, Cold Springs Pictures, Montecito Picture Company, Barnette / Thayer, Dune Entertainment, Ingenious Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

A love story about one of the most influential filmmakers of the last century, Alfred Hitchcock and his wife and partner Alma Reville. The film takes place during the making of Hitchcock's seminal movie Psycho.

Opening Weekend:$287,715 (4.8% of total gross)
Legs:5.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
